summary: First iteration full-stack QA of OneX Club. All 27 backend pytest cases pass (100%). All 12 frontend pages render correctly under seeded session, sidebar shows 12 nav items + AED balance + profile + logout, Join Waitlist transitions to 'Waitlist Joined', Sign Out redirects to /login. Login button has correct data-testid and text 'Continue with Google'. Minor naming/markup discrepancies vs spec only.

minor.issue: Uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') — switch to lifespan handlers for FastAPI >=0.110

MilestoneAction has dead branch (activated_next flag never used); second loop always promotes the first 'upcoming' to 'pending' which may double-promote if multiple upcoming exist. Works correctly for current 5-milestone flow but logic is fragile.
stats.balance_this_week is hardcoded to 35 — not derived from activity_log

ui_bugs.issue: login-google-btn is a <button> with no href and no inline onclick attribute. The review request asked to verify 'href format pointing to auth.emergentagent.com'. The button works via a React onClick handler (not statically introspectable), so navigation cannot be verified without triggering OAuth. Recommend rendering as <a href='https://auth.emergentagent.com/?redirect=...'> so markup-level inspection passes and the link is crawlable.

action_items: Consider switching Login 'Continue with Google' to an <a> element so the href to auth.emergentagent.com is statically present (currently click handler only).
Align data-testid naming with review spec for join waitlist / category cards / logout (minor) — or update the spec.
Replace deprecated @app.on_event with FastAPI lifespan context manager.
Derive dashboard.stats.balance_this_week from activity_log instead of hardcoded 35.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~860 lines — borderline; consider splitting into modules (auth, dashboard, properties, webinars, social, settings) for maintainability.
Leaderboard sort recomputes pool on every request — fine for seed scale but should be paginated/cached if user count grows.
_user_rank() duplicates leaderboard pool-building logic from /api/leaderboard — extract a shared helper to honour DRY.
No rate limiting on POST /api/support/contact, /api/referrals/share, /api/properties/waitlist — trivially spam-able.
Bearer token + cookie auth coexist correctly; expiry parsing handles both naive and aware datetimes — good.
All endpoints exclude _id properly via projection — clean.
All write endpoints return {ok: true} as expected; toggles return new state — UI integration straightforward.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (12/12 pages render, all interactive flows work; only the login href markup is a minor deviation)

test_credentials: Bearer test_session_1781303183733 (user_qa_1781303183733 / qa.surya.1781303183733@onex.club, tier Cadet, AED 285). Auto-seeded via mongosh snippet in /app/auth_testing.md.
seed_data_creation: None new — used existing seeded session and DB seeds.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. They expect REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL + bearer token defaults. For Playwright, set cookie session_token=<token>, domain=exclusive-members-1.preview.emergentagent.com, httpOnly+secure+sameSite=None. Page testids follow pattern '<page>-<element>' (e.g. property-join-<propId>, sidebar-logout-btn, settings-save-btn).
rca of the issue: N/A — no critical issues found. The 'login href is None' observation is by design (React SPA button with handler), not a bug. Suggested cosmetic improvement only.
